div.head: The Secretary of State to the Minister in Switzerland (Harrison)
div.p: 56. For all Missions. Department is receiving requests from diplomatic representatives of the other American republics for advice and assistance to their nationals in Europe desirous of returning to this continent. Because of the increasingly close and friendly relations maintained with the other American governments, the Department is desirous of doing everything possible to be of assistance to them and their citizens during the present situation and accordingly will appreciate your cooperation with representatives and private citizens of those countries who may apply to you, consistent of course with your obligations to American nationals.
